name: Wye Valley Walk: Ross to Kerne Bridge
terrain: Riverside track, woodland path, brief lane
highlights: Gentle Wye meander through Coppet Hill shoulder to the railway-era Kerne Bridge.
points_of_interest: St Mary's Ross; Pencraig wood; Goodrich Castle 1 mi diversion; Kerne Bridge
parking_start: Ross Prospect pay & display / Wilton Road Kerne Bridge
food_drink_nearby: Kings Head Ross; The Chase; The Castle View Goodrich; Inn on the Wye
hazards_notes: Check river levels — path floods on Wye rises
